prompt: sp001 is at spec stage with plan + tasks refined — run spec-ready to mint bd ids and queue it. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.

assertions.text: Agent read sp001 and confirmed status: spec
Agent created exactly one bd epic for sp001
Agent created at least 3 bd tasks (one per ### Task N block)
All bd tasks have --parent linking to the epic
Agent added blocking deps per #### depends (at least 2 deps: Task 2 depends on Task 1, Task 3 depends on Task 1 and/or Task 2)
Agent annotated each ### Task N block in sp001 with a #### bd <id> line
Agent flipped sp001 status from spec to ready
Agent moved docs/board.md [[sp001]] from ## spec to ## ready
Agent did NOT use bd update --status in_progress (execution out of scope)
Agent did NOT use bd close (execution out of scope)
Agent did NOT touch source code (src/ unchanged)
